title: astragalus tumidus
intro: Astragalus tumidus, also known as the inflated milkvetch, is a perennial legume native to the mountainous regions of China and other parts of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. The health benefits of Astragalus tumidus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and fatigue, and improve cardiovascular health. Astragalus tumidus is often prepared as a dried root, capsule, or tea, and is also used in combination with other herbs to create herbal preparations such as tinctures, infusions, and decoctions.
